notes: Severely incomplete: Mario rendering is broken (only half-body drawn), platforms are flat and horizontal with no arcade-style incline, ladder climbing barely works, barrels don't properly roll down platforms, movement is restricted during jumps making controls feel broken, and the overall layout/visual fidelity bears little resemblance to the original Donkey Kong arcade game.

The build runs and has basic movement/jumping/enemies, but level progression is effectively broken, the layout and sprites are far from authentic Donkey Kong, controls are simplistic/imprecise, and LEVEL_COMPLETE never resolves which is a significant functional flaw.
